title: lithocarpus carolinae
intro: Lithocarpus carolinae, also known as the Carolina nutmeg tree, is a species of evergreen tree native to the southeastern United States. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat respiratory issues, skin conditions, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Lithocarpus carolinae include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of colds, fever, and other infections. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and seeds are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various health conditions.
